evidenceSummary: Six of thirty-nine UDID-backed instances stalled before claim submission because evidence URI input was absent.

proposedChange.description: Add a required evidence URI input to the claim submission step and clarify upstream condition text.

expectedBenefit: Reduce claim submission stalls caused by missing evidence input.
risk: May require migration guidance for active flow instances using the old template.
rollbackConsideration: Revert the template change if post-patch missing-input rate does not improve.
approvalRequirement: Human or governance approval is required before applying the template change.
regressionWatchMetric: missing_input blocker rate on submit-claim over the next weekly cohort
